params.name: Poetics-Aristotle
params.description: Aristotle's Poetics is the first art theory system in Western civilization and laid the foundation for Western literary theory. This work, authored by the ancient Greek philosopher Aristotle, mainly discusses tragedy, comedy, and epic, particularly the origins, historical development, and principles of creation of tragedy and epic. The existing first volume discusses tragedy and epic, while the second volume, which discussed comedy, has unfortunately been lost. In Poetics, Aristotle introduced t …
